introSection: Pinball X is a steel spinning wild mouse roller coaster currently located at Flamingo Park in Hastings, East Sussex, England, UK.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The roller coaster was announced as part of a nine ride package for Dreamland Margate from Zamperla. The name was revealed to be Pinball X shortly after. It opened in July 2018. It was dismantled in April 2021 and sent to Flamingo Park.

fullText:
Pinball X is a steel spinning wild mouse roller coaster currently located at Flamingo Park in Hastings, East Sussex, England, UK.

The roller coaster was announced as part of a nine ride package for Dreamland Margate from Zamperla. The name was revealed to be Pinball X shortly after. It opened in July 2018. It was dismantled in April 2021 and sent to Flamingo Park.
